summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's championship bid as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on his Spanish victory and shake off recent struggles at Spa's high-speed corners. McLaren's consistency and Red Bull's resilience in unpredictable weather will test whether Hamilton's confidence translates into sustained competitiveness across the grid's most demanding power circuit. A strong result here could reshape the constructors' battle and signal whether Ferrari's revival has genuine staying power or remains built on a single driver's heroics.
